creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
This was recently fixed in FreeBSD current, as per PR270053, and will therefore be fixed in FreeBSD 14.0 release - expected to be released in July 2023.

Given this is how the msdosfs driver has functioned since it was first introduced to FreeBSD decades ago, I don’t believe there is value in merging this back to 13-STABLE for 13.3-RELEASE.

Therefore, I’m going to mark this bug as fixed, awaiting the 14.0-RELEASE.

Stefan / Nicolas - please let me know if you have any objections to this.

Thanks again to Stefan for his work fixing this issue.
